### init_core_routers

``` python

def init_core_routers(
    workflow:StructureDecompWorkflow, # The workflow instance
    prefix:str, # Base prefix for core routes (e.g., "/workflow/core")
)->Tuple: # (routers, merged_routes)

```

*Initialize and return all core workflow routers.*

Note: Chrome switching route is now in cjm-transcript-segment-align
library. It is initialized in routes/init.py alongside the other
segment-align routes.
